title: No length cap on title/description before DB storage
description: CardData fields title, description, html, provider_name, author_name etc. are stored in SQLite TEXT columns with no length constraint. A malicious page can set og:title content to a megabyte-long string (within the 1MB body limit). This bloats the DB and API responses. Mastodon caps title at 200 chars and description at 512 chars. Fix: truncate title to ~200 chars and description to ~512 chars after extraction, before DB insert.
